code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});export const firstSuccess=async requests=>{let lastError;for(const request of requests){try{return await request();}catch(error){lastError=error;}}throw lastError;};export default api;
